creator: gary@hayers.org
text:
Addition of security/sav 
Sophos Anti Virus System

Many thanks to Jason Helfman <jgh@FreeBSD.org> for his help.

Also needs sweep user and group added to UIDs and GIDs

--- UIDs-orig	2013-03-24 12:00:36.000000000 +0000
+++ UIDs	2013-03-13 11:59:03.000000000 +0000
@@ -256,4 +256,5 @@
 ossecm:*:967:966::0:0:OSSEC mail user:/usr/local/ossec-hids:/usr/sbin/nologin
 ossecr:*:968:966::0:0:OSSEC rem user:/usr/local/ossec-hids:/usr/sbin/nologin
 kippo:*:969:969::0:0:kippo user:/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologin
+sweep:*:999:999::0:0:Sophos Sweep user:/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologin
 nobody:*:65534:65534::0:0:Unprivileged user:/nonexistent:/usr/sbin/nologin


--- GIDs-orig	2013-03-24 12:00:58.000000000 +0000
+++ GIDs	2013-03-13 11:57:55.000000000 +0000
@@ -250,5 +250,6 @@
 elasticsearch:*:965:
 ossec:*:966:
 kippo:*:969:
+sweep:*:999:
 nogroup:*:65533:
 nobody:*:65534:

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
